control_awareness: Aware that P2P-C-001 requires department head approval for amounts >= 1,000,000, and P2P-C-003 requires pre-PO approval except documented emergency which does not apply here.
expected_control_effect: The purchase request will be routed for department head approval before proceeding, ensuring compliance with approval thresholds and segregation of duties.
overall_reason: The purchase need amount is 1,750,000 which falls into the department head approval range per control P2P-C-001. There is no unusual pressure that necessitates deviation from the normal process. Creating one purchase request with the full amount and normal routing complies with controls and provides a clear auditable trail.
reason: The total amount exceeds the 1,000,000 threshold requiring department head approval. Creating a single purchase request with the full amount is appropriate and aligns with normal processing without pressure.
